entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The crop species Arachis hypogaea L. being studied for drought tolerance

entities.name: WATER DEFICIT STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand lack of water

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE
entities.description: A population derived from crossing two parents used for genetic mapping

entities.name: TMV 2
entities.description: An elite peanut variety used as a parent for the RIL population

entities.name: TMV 2-NLM
entities.description: A narrow leaf mutant peanut variety used as a parent for the RIL population

entities.name: DHARWAD
entities.description: A location in India used for non-stress environment phenotyping

entities.name: TIRUPATI
entities.description: A location in India used for water-stress environment phenotyping

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research trials were conducted

entities.name: NON-STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition without water deficit

entities.name: WATER-STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by water deficit

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Measurable biological characteristics of the plant

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A map showing the relative positions of markers on a chromosome

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of the genome associated with a particular quantitative trait

entities.name: BEST LINEAR UNBIASED PREDICTIONS
entities.description: A statistical method used to estimate trait values

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The capacity of the plant to maintain growth and yield under drought

entities.name: SINGLE MARKER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method to identify associations between a single marker and a trait

entities.name: COMPOSITE INTERVAL MAPPING
entities.description: A method for high-resolution QTL mapping

entities.name: MULTIPLE QTL MAPPING
entities.description: A method to identify multiple genomic regions governing a trait

entities.name: POD YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The amount of pods produced per individual plant, denoted as PYPP

entities.name: SPECIFIC DRY WEIGHT AT 70 DAYS AFTER SOWING
entities.description: Dry weight of the plant at 70 DAS, denoted as SDW_70

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA AT 70 DAS
entities.description: Leaf area relative to weight at 70 DAS, denoted as SLA_70

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC VARIANCE EXPLAINED
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation attributed to a QTL

entities.name: EPISTATIC INTERACTIONS
entities.description: Interactions between different genes/loci

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Genes located within QTL regions that are likely to influence the trait

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as genetic markers

entities.name: AHMITE1
entities.description: A specific insertion marker identified in candidate genes

entities.name: AH02_1558700
entities.description: A specific nonsynonymous SNP marker

entities.name: ARAHYW1P0U6
entities.description: A gene governing pod yield per plant

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL ANALYSIS
entities.description: The study of the biological function of candidate genes

entities.name: GENETIC MODIFICATIONS
entities.description: The process of altering genetic material to improve traits

relationships.target: SPECIFIC DRY WEIGHT AT 70 DAYS AFTER SOWING
